sections.paragraph:
Original: צלל

Transliteration: tsâlal

Phonetic: tsaw-lal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to tingle, quiver
    1. (Qal)
      1. to tingle (of ears)
      2. to quiver (of fear)

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H6749 through the idea of vibration]

TWOT entry: 1919

Part(s) of speech: Verb
